sourcesContent:
import { useAuth } from "../utils/AuthContext"; import APP_VERSION from '../version'; import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../utils/api'; const STATUS_TAG = { compliant: Compliant, partial: Partial, non_compliant: Non-compliant, }; export default function DashboardPage() { const [data, setData] = useState(null); const [syncLog, setSyncLog] = useState(null); const { user } = useAuth(); const [overdue, setOverdue] = useState([]); const [leaderboard, setLeaderboard] = useState([]); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { api.get('/dashboard').then(r => setData(r.data)).catch(console.error); api.get('/employees/overdue').then(r => setOverdue(r.data)).catch(console.error); api.get('/audits/leaderboard').then(r => setLeaderboard(r.data)).catch(console.error); api.get('/sync-log/latest').then(r => setSyncLog(r.data)).catch(console.error); }, []); const initials = name => name?.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).slice(0, 2).join('').toUpperCase() || '?'; const avatarClass = i => ['av-teal','av-navy','av-coral','av-purple'][i % 4]; const greeting = () => { const h = new Date().getHours(); if (h < 12) return 'Good morning'; if (h < 17) return 'Good afternoon'; return 'Good evening'; }; const dateStr = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }); return ( <>
ESAT › Dashboard
{APP_VERSION}
{greeting()}, {user?.name || "Safety Officer"}
{dateStr} · Nairobi
{ e.target.style.display='none'; }} />
Total Active Project Members
{data?.employees.active ?? '—'}
Overdue (>30 days)
{data?.overdue ?? '—'}
Need immediate audit
Open NCRs
{data?.ncr.open ?? '—'}
Pending resolution
Compliance rate
{data?.compliance_rate != null ? `${data.compliance_rate}%` : '—'}
This month
{/* PPE Delay Cards */}
EHS Delay
{data?.delays?.ehs ?? '—'} Days
Longest Pending → EHS Approval
SCM Delay
{data?.delays?.scm ?? '—'} Days
Longest EHS Approved → SCM Ordered
Suppliers Delay
{data?.delays?.suppliers ?? '—'} Days
Longest SCM Ordered → Warehouse
Projects Delay
{data?.delays?.projects ?? '—'} Days
Longest Warehouse → Distributed
Overdue audits {overdue.length} employees
{overdue.slice(0, 5).map((e, i) => ( ))} {overdue.length === 0 && ( )}
EmployeeProjectLast audit
{initials(e.full_name)}
{e.full_name}
{e.national_id||e.employee_number}
 {e.project || "—"} 45 ? 'dot-red' : 'dot-amber'}`}> {e.days_since_audit ? `${e.days_since_audit} days` : 'Never'}
All employees are up to date ✓
NCRs by PPE/Tool Item
{(data?.ncr?.by_category || []).map((r, i) => { const pct2 = Math.max(...(data?.ncr?.by_category||[]).map(x=>parseInt(x.count))) > 0 ? Math.round((parseInt(r.count)/Math.max(...(data?.ncr?.by_category||[]).map(x=>parseInt(x.count))))*100) : 0; const cls = pct2 >= 75 ? 'danger' : pct2 >= 40 ? 'warning' : 'navy'; const label = r.ppe_name; const pct = Math.max(...(data?.ncr?.by_category||[]).map(x=>parseInt(x.count))) > 0 ? Math.round((parseInt(r.count)/Math.max(...(data?.ncr?.by_category||[]).map(x=>parseInt(x.count))))*100) : 0; return (
{label} {r.count} items
); })} {(!data?.ncr?.by_category?.length) &&
No open NCRs
}
Auditor Leaderboard
{leaderboard.map((u, i) => ( ))} {!leaderboard.length && }
#AuditorTotal AuditsThis Month
{i+1}
{u.profile_picture ? :
{u.full_name.split(' ').map(w=>w[0]).slice(0,2).join('').toUpperCase()}
}
{u.full_name}
 {u.total_audits} {u.this_month} this month
No audits yet
Recent audits
{(data?.recent_audits || []).map((a, i) => ( ))} {!data?.recent_audits?.length && ( )}
EmployeeProjectAudited byDateItemsIssuesStatus
{initials(a.employee_name)}
{a.employee_name}
{a.national_id||a.employee_number}
 {a.project || '—'} {a.audited_by_name} {new Date(a.audit_date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB')} {a.total_items} 0 ? 'tag-red' : 'tag-green'}`}> {a.issues_count} {a.issues_count === 1 ? 'issue' : 'issues'} {STATUS_TAG[a.overall_status]}
No audits yet
); }
